antipattern.symptom: RAG recall drops 0.1–0.5% over time; no error in logs.
antipattern.root-cause: MD5 collision returns the wrong embedding silently; rate scales with collection size.
antipattern.fix: Switch to SHA-256. Re-ingest collection; old cache entries remain harmless (different namespace).

antipattern.symptom: After provider model bump, retrieval quality regresses; same texts return old embeddings.
antipattern.root-cause: Key derived from text only; new model_version cannot invalidate old entries.
antipattern.fix: Include `model_version` in key. On provider version bump, old entries simply miss → re-embed on access.

antipattern.symptom: Vectors against deprecated model served for months.
antipattern.fix: Cap TTL at min(model_deprecation_days, 365). Flush on deprecation event.

antipattern.symptom: Cache layer adds latency on misses but no one knows the hit rate.
antipattern.fix: Emit `embedding_cache.hit` / `.miss` per call to observability. Alert if hit_rate < 5% over 30 days.
